meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Claude Code Skills to Solve Debugging Woes
content.seo_description: Master Claude Code skills to overcome debugging frustration. A professional, beginner-friendly guide to building resilient apps using Antigravity and AI.
content.answer_block: To solve debugging bottlenecks, leverage Claude Code to audit your codebase in real-time. By integrating Antigravity for automated environment validation and applying Claude's reasoning to your stack traces, you transform mysterious crashes into actionable fixes. This workflow turns your development environment into an autonomous partner that accelerates your learning curve.
content.intro:
The cursor blinks, mocking you. You have been staring at a 'TypeError' for three hours, and the stack trace feels like a cryptic riddle written in a dead language. Every student has been here—the moment where the excitement of building your first SaaS app hits the wall of technical debt and silent failures. You are not failing; you are simply lacking the right leverage.

Today, we shift your paradigm. You are moving from 'guessing' what is wrong to 'architecting' solutions with Claude Code. We will turn your terminal into an AI-powered engineering workstation, allowing you to debug with the precision of a senior developer. It is time to stop fighting your code and start commanding it.

steps.title: Initialize the Workspace Context
steps.description: Before debugging, you must ensure the AI understands your project structure. We use Antigravity to map dependencies so Claude doesn't chase ghosts.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scan the current project directory, map all dependencies, and generate a structural summary for Claude to reference during debugging.

steps.title: Capture the Failure State
steps.description: Feeding a raw error to an AI is useless if the context is missing. Capture the exact state of the failure before attempting a fix.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the last stack trace and the state of the local variables at the moment of the crash.

steps.title: Execute Root Cause Analysis
steps.description: Ask Claude to perform a 'blame' analysis to identify if the error is a logic bug or an environment misconfiguration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Identify the specific line of code causing the crash and explain the logical fallacy behind the error.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Why is this function returning null despite the input validation?'

steps.title: Implement Defensive Patches
steps.description: Instead of just fixing the bug, build a test case that prevents it from ever returning. This is how you build production-grade habits.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a unit test that recreates this bug and then provide a patch that satisfies the test case.

steps.title: Verify Through Automated Regression
steps.description: Finalize the fix by ensuring the entire application suite remains stable. Never trust a fix until the suite passes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run the full test suite and verify that the fix did not introduce regressions in related modules.

pro_tips: Always provide the file path explicitly to Claude Code to prevent it from hallucinating code from outside your scope.
Use Antigravity to generate 'TODO' comments in your code based on your debugging session to manage technical debt.
If Claude gets stuck, ask it to 'Explain its reasoning process' before providing the fix to catch logical errors early.
Keep your terminal history clean; use Claude Code's session tagging to isolate debugging sessions for complex features.
Treat your error logs as data; feed them into a dedicated 'debug.log' file and point Claude to it for pattern recognition.
content.next_steps: After mastering this debugging workflow, focus on building your first CI/CD pipeline to automate the deployment of your patched code.
content.conversion_block: You now possess the tools to bypass the frustration that stops most students in their tracks. Don't just fix bugs—build the future. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
